result_empty_am: No morning steps in this routine.
result_empty_pm: No evening steps in this routine.
result_disclaimer: Sangam Skin gives cosmetic guidance, not medical advice.
result_why_body: Every routine here passes through the same conflict engine as the app — no retinol layered with acids, nothing potent for beginners, nothing pregnancy-unsafe.
note_retinoid: Start 2 nights/week, build up as your skin adjusts.
note_acid: Use 2–3 nights per week; never layer with other exfoliants.
note_potent: Potent formula — introduce gradually and patch-test first.
note_vitc: Finish with SPF — vitamin C works best under sun protection.
prod_no_actives: No strong actives — a gentle, simple formula.
prod_quiz_prompt: Not sure if this is right for you?
prod_not_found_body: This product isn't in the catalogue. Head back and browse the full range.
ing_sub: 50 active ingredients used across our 118 serums — what each one does, what it pairs with, and what to keep it away from.
about_title: The intelligence layer behind our serums.
about_lede: Sangam Herbals has formulated Ayurvedic skincare for years. Sangam Skin is how we help you actually find the right formulas — the quiz, the ingredient-safety engine, and this website, all built to make our range easy to navigate honestly.
about_story_p1: With 118 serums in the range, even our own team found it hard to point someone to exactly the right three or four products for their skin. So we built the same tool for customers that we used internally: a quiz that scores every formula against your answers, and a conflict engine that knows which actives shouldn't be layered together.
about_story_p2: That engine now runs in the Sangam Skin app and on this website — same logic, same 118 products, same safety rules, wherever you use it.
about_approach_1_body: Every active is named, at its real concentration, with a plain-language explanation of what it does and what to watch for.
about_approach_2_body: The recommendation engine will never suggest a potent active to a beginner, or a pregnancy-unsafe ingredient regardless of how well it scores.
about_approach_3_body: Routines are capped at what you asked for — minimal, standard, or full — never padded to sell more than you need.
about_disclaimer_p1: Sangam Skin — the quiz, Skin Lens, the ingredient glossary, and every recommendation on this site — provides cosmetic guidance only. It is not a substitute for professional medical or dermatological advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
about_disclaimer_p2: If you have a persistent skin concern, a known allergy, or are pregnant or breastfeeding, please consult a qualified healthcare provider before starting a new active ingredient.
lens_dims_note: Illustrative example — your own reading depends on your photo.
lens_step_1_body: Soft, even light, no filters. The scan checks lighting quality first and asks again if it's too dark to read.
lens_step_2_body: Hydration, texture, radiance, evenness, pores, calm and the under-eye area — each scored, with strengths named before anything else.
lens_step_3_body: The read feeds the same recommendation engine as the quiz — up to 3 Sangam serums that match what your skin is asking for, never a generic upsell.
lens_privacy_body: Your photo is sent for a single analysis request and is not stored on our servers afterward. Skin Lens never diagnoses a medical condition — it's a cosmetic, wellness-oriented read only.
lres_disclaimer_photo: This is a cosmetic read that reflects your photo and its lighting today — not a measurement of your skin.
lens_availability: Skin Lens is part of the Sangam Skin app (in development). In the meantime, the quiz below uses the same recommendation engine.
footer_tagline: Ayurvedic serums, matched to your skin by an ingredient-safety engine.
footer_app_note: The Sangam Skin app is currently in development. This website carries the same quiz and product intelligence.
footer_disclaimer: Cosmetic guidance only — not medical advice.
hero_title: Ayurvedic serums, matched to your skin.
hero_sub: 118 clinically-formulated serums for face, hair, lips and lashes — narrowed to your exact routine by a two-minute quiz and an ingredient-safety engine that never lets a retinol meet an acid by accident.
hero_float_title: Retinol kept out of your AM routine
how_title: From quiz to routine in four steps
how_sub: The same recommendation engine that powers the Sangam Skin app, running right here in your browser.
how_1_body: Skin type, concerns, age, experience with actives, pregnancy status — nine quick questions, no account required.
how_2_body: Our engine scores all 118 formulas against your answers and builds a real AM and PM routine, not a generic list.
how_3_body: Every routine is run through a conflict engine — no retinol layered with acids, no potent actives for beginners, nothing pregnancy-unsafe.
how_4_body: Each product links to the actives inside it, in plain language — what it does, how to use it, what to avoid it with.
lens_title: A gentle, AI-powered read of your skin.
lens_body: Take a selfie and get a cosmetic reading across seven dimensions — hydration, texture, radiance, evenness and more — with strengths named before anything else. It's a wellness guide, never a diagnosis.
lens_point_1: Scored across 7 dimensions with a simple 0–100 glow score
lens_point_3: Your photo stays on your device except for the single analysis request
featured_title: A first look at the range
science_body: No miracle claims. Our 50-ingredient glossary tells you what each active actually does, what it pairs well with, and what to keep it away from — the same data our conflict engine uses to build your routine.
founder_quote: We built Sangam Skin the way we'd want it built for our own family — honest ingredient lists, no filler, and a routine that respects that everyone's skin gets there differently.
appcta_body: Everything on this site — the quiz, the catalogue, Skin Lens — runs in the Sangam Skin app too, with progress tracking, reminders and a saved routine.
